description: Catalog/global/shared tables allowed to keep nullable tenant_id by design. Additions require an explicit owner + reason in the same PR.

tables.standards: ISO standards library — shared catalog (global unique codes)
tables.clauses: ISO clause library — shared under standards
tables.controls: ISO control library — shared under clauses
tables.system_settings: Platform settings; tenant_id optional for global keys
tables.roles: Role definitions historically global (C-05 follow-on for tenant-scoped roles)
tables.asset_types: Asset type taxonomy; may be shared across tenants
tables.form_templates: Form template library; may include global templates
tables.investigation_templates: Investigation template library; may include global templates
tables.audit_templates: Audit template library; may include global/shared templates
